description: Failed/partial acceptance remediation pass — RBAC parity, member lifecycle completion, item batch availability, and API/sync consistency

fixes.title: RBAC policy parity across backend routes, frontend nav/routes, and API expectations
changes: orders/handler.go: added module-level RequireRoles(administrator, operations_manager, member) guard on /orders group
groupbuys/handler.go: added module-level RequireRoles(administrator, operations_manager, member) guard on /group-buys group
inventory/handler.go: added module-level RequireRoles(administrator, operations_manager, procurement_specialist) guard on /inventory group
router/routes.ts: restricted Group Buys navigation visibility to administrator/operations_manager/member
router/index.tsx: wrapped group-buy routes with matching ProtectedRoute role scope
tests/api/groupbuy_test.go: updated coach access assertion to 403 to match route policy

fixes.title: Members lifecycle endpoint completion and object-level protection hardening
changes: Implemented POST /members create flow with validation, duplicate handling, and audit log
Implemented PATCH /members/:id update flow with dynamic field updates, nullable date handling, and audit log
Constrained member read-side routes so member role can access only own /members/:id, /members/:id/orders, and /members/:id/group-buys

fixes.title: Batch update now supports availability windows alongside price updates
changes: items/handler.go: extended batch request schema with availability_windows and added RFC3339/time-order validation
items/handler.go: batch update now runs in a transaction and can update price and replace availability windows in one request
api/items.ts: BatchUpdatePayload now includes availability_windows
ItemListPage.tsx: batch dialog now captures availability start/end, validates input, and sends combined price/window payload

fixes.title: Item detail flow now exposes direct start/join group-buy actions for members
changes: ItemDetailPage.tsx: added member-only Start Group Buy action that routes to /group-buys/new?item_id=<item>
ItemDetailPage.tsx: added Join Active Group Buy action by discovering active/published group-buy for the current item
groupbuys/handler.go: list endpoint now supports item_id filtering to power item-context group-buy discovery

fixes.title: Frontend list APIs standardized on shared client path with rawResponse meta
changes: Replaced direct fetch list calls with apiRequest(..., { rawResponse: true }) for pagination/meta consistency
Aligned group-buys, inventory, suppliers, purchase-orders, and exports list implementations to a single authenticated request pattern

fixes.title: Offline-first mutation queuing added for group-buy write paths
changes: Added offline detection fallback for createGroupBuy, joinGroupBuy, and leaveGroupBuy
Queued mutations via sync/offlineQueue enqueue() when requests fail due offline/network conditions
Returned optimistic group-buy/participant responses for queued actions to preserve UX continuity
